creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Since it's a list, the right syntax is

```
set(CPACK_FREEBSD_PACKAGE_DEPS "devel/spdlog" "devel/gpds")
```

where the quotes are optional, too -- unless there are really weird characters in a port / dependency name, you won't hit CMake string restrictions in this variable's value. There was *also* a bona-fide bug in the generator code, which I'm pretty sure I fixed here.
